creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Adam.  I definitely trust your experience as maintainer here and agree you shouldn't commit this as is.

Likely this affects a relatively small number of people since I expect most FreeBSD users now use binary packages and are not concerned about the build time.  Given that, I think having it as an option is a reasonable solution for those of us who do build from source.  I'm also happy to keep this as a local change if you don't want to go to the trouble of an option (although the option may prevent similar PRs in future).
